title: Cream in Coffee as Reverse Traversal

analysis.object: T543: Cream in Coffee as Reverse Traversal depth analysis

kh_instability.description: Miscible interface: Kelvin-Helmholtz instability; billowing rolls are EML-3
kh_instability.reason: K-H rolls are EML-3 oscillatory structures at cream-coffee interface

mixing_cascade.description: Mixing proceeds: EML-inf turbulent mixing -> EML-3 diffusion -> EML-2 gradient -> EML-0 uniform
mixing_cascade.reason: Mixing is reverse traversal: inf->3->2->1->0; death of the cream

irreversibility.description: Mixed state is EML-0 (uniform, dead); thermodynamic arrow is depth arrow
irreversibility.reason: Final mixed state is EML-0: maximum entropy, minimum depth

every_mixing.description: Every mixing process is a death: reverse traversal inf->...->0
every_mixing.reason: Mixing = death theorem: all mixing follows inf->3->2->1->0 depth path

analysis.theorem: T543: Cream in Coffee as Reverse Traversal (S822).

key_theorem: T543: Cream in Coffee as Reverse Traversal (S822).
